title: dortmanna exaltata
intro: Dortmanna exaltata, also known as the tall water plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant that grows in shallow waters and is characterized by its tall, slender stems and long, narrow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Dortmanna exaltata include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its role in promoting wound healing and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna exaltata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
